route_template_items.item_description: i. Dashboard access to linked account

route_audit_results.comment: Batch OK
Access OK
Finalized
Testing Storage

QrfBjbubfaKPkb The merchant has implemented the standard checkout on both web and Android apps, using UPI as the standalone payment method. Settlement is blocked on the main MID. The payments made by customers are transferred to the relevant linked accounts, and these transfers are completed through the order transfer using the order ID.
Since they have only two linked accounts, they created the linked account from the dashboard.
web and android
The merchant will create linked accounts manually through the dashboard, as only a small number of linked accounts are required. Transactions will be created through the order flow.
